name: West African Lemony Chicken-Okra Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lbs broiler chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broiler-fryer chicken into pieces.
2. If using canned okra, drain it well.
3. Rub lemon juice over the chicken pieces.
4. Place the chicken in a large kettle with chicken broth or water.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Lower heat and cook slowly, covered for 12 minutes.
7. Add remaining ingredients and continue to cook slowly until chicken and rice are tender, about 30 minutes.
8. Remove chicken pieces and debone.
9. Cut the meat into small pieces and return it to the kettle.
10. Serves 4 to 6.
